props.name: items
props.description: An array of image URLs to be displayed as flying posters.

props.name: planeWidth
props.description: The width of each poster plane in pixels.

props.name: planeHeight
props.description: The height of each poster plane in pixels.

props.name: distortion
props.description: The amount of distortion applied to the posters' movement.

props.name: scrollEase
props.description: The easing factor for smooth scrolling interactions.

props.name: cameraFov
props.description: The field of view for the camera in degrees.

props.name: cameraZ
props.description: The Z position of the camera, affecting zoom and perspective.
